## Problem this solves

Describe the problem or limitation you’re hitting.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you’d like to see and how it would work.

## Use case

How you’d use this feature in your environment (e.g. homelab setup, specific stacks, notification needs).

## Alternatives considered

Any existing workarounds or alternative tools you’ve tried.

## Additional context

Any other details, sketches, or references (e.g. similar behavior in other tools).
